cmd:
sed -i 's/async function incrementCounter() {/async function incrementCounter() {\
  const client = createClient();\
  const newValue = await client.incr(COUNTER_KEY);\
  logger.debug(`Counter incremented: $$(await client.get(COUNTER_KEY)) -> $$newValue`);\
  return newValue;/g' /app/app/counter.js
